steps.title: Undo the addition
steps.content: The equation is $w+7=357$. To isolate $w$, subtract $7$ from both sides.

steps.title: Check the choices
steps.content: Choice A would come from dividing $357$ by $7$. Choice C would come from adding $7$. The equation asks for $w$ in $w+7=357$, so $w=350$.

steps.title: Answer
steps.content: $350$ matches choice B, so B is correct.
